report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn guides: Decentralized GPU & Compute Networks Guide 2026 (Akash, Render, io.net, Aethir) and Cross-chain Interoperability & Messaging Guide 2026 (LayerZero, Wormhole, CCIP, Axelar, Hyperlane, Across). Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Decentralized Compute: Market hit $12.2B in 2024, projected $39.5B by 2033. AI demand has created GPU scarcity with high costs and long waitlists. Decentralized providers offer 60-80% cost savings vs AWS. Key players: Render Network ($2B+ market cap, 600+ AI models via Dispersed.com, $1.75/compute hour), Akash Network (428% YoY growth, 80%+ utilization, $3.36M monthly volume), io.net (1M+ aggregated GPUs), Aethir (1.4B+ compute hours delivered, $40M quarterly revenue, 435K+ GPU containers across 93 countries).

Cross-chain Interoperability: LayerZero dominates 57% of cross-chain volume with $100B+ cumulative transferred across 165+ chains. Announced own L1 'Zero' for fall 2026 backed by Citadel Securities, ARK Invest, Google Cloud (2M TPS target). Wormhole integrated XRP Ledger (35+ chains), transitioned to ZK proofs replacing Guardian trust model. Hyperlane offers permissionless chain connections. Across leads intent-based fast bridging. Chainlink CCIP emerging as enterprise standard. Axelar's Interchain Amplifier enables single-integration connectivity to entire network.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Decentralized GPU & Compute Networks Guide 2026 (~3200 words, 8 sections): What are decentralized compute networks, why they matter in 2026, how they work, top protocols compared (Render/Akash/io.net/Aethir with comparison table), use cases (AI training, rendering, inference), tokenomics & incentives, risks & challenges, future outlook. Includes info boxes, FAQ, related articles.

Cross-chain Interoperability & Messaging Guide 2026 (~3000 words, 8 sections): What is cross-chain interoperability, why messaging matters, how it works (verification models), top protocols compared (LayerZero/Wormhole/CCIP/Axelar/Hyperlane/Across with comparison table), security models & trust assumptions, real-world use cases, risks & challenges, future of interoperability. Includes info boxes, FAQ, related articles.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026: Title 'Decentralized GPU & Compute Networks Guide 2026: Akash, Render, io.net & Aethir | degen0x', target keywords: decentralized compute, decentralized GPU, Akash Network, Render Network, io.net, Aethir, DePIN compute, AI compute crypto. Article + FAQ schema (6 questions). Internal links to /learn/ai-depin-crypto-guide, /learn/ai-crypto-agents-guide, /learn/bittensor-tao-guide, /learn/tokenomics-protocol-revenue-guide, /tools/token-screener.

cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026: Title 'Cross-chain Interoperability Guide 2026: LayerZero, Wormhole, CCIP & More | degen0x', target keywords: cross-chain interoperability, cross-chain messaging, LayerZero, Wormhole, Chainlink CCIP, blockchain bridges, omnichain. Article + FAQ schema (6 questions). Internal links to /learn/cross-chain-bridges-guide, /learn/layer-1-vs-layer-2, /learn/what-is-a-bridge, /learn/zero-knowledge-proofs, /tools/bridge-aggregator.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
